title: When tradition becomes torture: Inside Bihar’s pakadua vivah cases
description: Bihar witnesses a disturbing rise in 'pakadua vivah,' where men and boys are forced into marriage. Recent cases across districts like Samastipur and Patna involve students, teachers, and even minors abducted and wedded under duress. Viral social media videos expose these incidents, prompting urgent calls for stricter laws and swifter police action against perpetrators.

Megyn Kelly responds to rumor over Candace Owens’ Bride of Charlie series
description: Megyn Kelly strongly denied rumors that she helped Candace Owens produce the Bride of Charlie series about Erika Kirk. After an X user claimed she screened the series and offered legal advice, Kelly responded, calling the allegation false and the poster a “filthy liar.” She also previously said she has criticized Owens many times and does not comment on every controversy.

title: This mechanical engineer chose to become a househusband, and why every man should read his story
description: Amit Kumar Dubey, a proud house husband from Bihar, has redefined traditional gender roles by dedicating himself to full-time household management. He gave up his job to support his wife, handling cooking, cleaning, and childcare. Despite occasional worries about his responsibilities as the eldest son, Amit finds fulfillment in his role, supported by his wife and family.

title: AJ Styles & Wendy Jones combined net worth 2026, retirement and legacy
description: Wrestling icon AJ Styles has officially hung up his boots in February 2026, retiring after a career-ending match and soon after, earning a WWE Hall of Fame induction. He and wife Wendy Jones, married since 2000, are now prioritizing family life in Georgia.
